name: agent-peer-collaboration
description: Vendor-neutral shared work-board protocol for coordinating multiple AI coding agents in a repository.

interface.shortDescription: Coordinate coding agents via a shared board
interface.longDescription: Provides a Codex adapter for the reusable, vendor-neutral protocol used by AI coding agents such as Codex, Claude, Gemini, and Copilot Auto. Agents use AGENT_CONVERSATION.md to continue assigned work, review peers, prune stale notes, and leave useful handoff context without blocking each other unnecessarily.
defaultPrompt: Use the shared agent board and continue assigned work.
Review peer notes and append useful handoff context.
Treat this plugin as the Codex adapter for a vendor-neutral protocol.
